channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: The 'fantastic' Nothing Phone (3) is one of the most eye-catching devices on the market — and it just scored a major discount at Best Buy
item.description: The Nothing Phone (3) is a unique device with a bold design and plenty of premium specs, and it's finally getting a real discount at Best Buy.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Nothing Phone 3 review on Android Central

item.title: Samsung's solution for apps with 'excessive' ads is rolling out now
item.description: Samsung's Device Care is finally receiving an old, long-rumored feature to help users with "excessive" ads from apps on their phones.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The back of the blue Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: The battle for your finger heats up as RingConn Gen 3 opens preorders
item.description: RingConn Gen 3 upgrades smart rings with vascular health insights, quieter haptic alerts, long battery life, and no subscription fees to worry about.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: RingConn Gen 3 smart rings in silver and gold
media:content.media:text: RingConn Gen 3 smart rings in silver and gold
media:content.media:title: RingConn Gen 3 smart rings in silver and gold

item.title: Yes, it's real — new Verizon deal gives your family four free phones AND unlimited wireless for only $25 per line
item.description: Verizon has launched a deal that will get you four free phones and four lines of the Unlimited Welcome plan for only $25 per month!
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:text: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.
media:content.media:title: The Google Pixel 10a in the Lavender colorway.

item.title: Whoop is putting a board-certified physician in its app to tell you why you’re tired
item.description: Whoop is turning its fitness app into an AI-powered health platform with live clinicians, smarter coaching, and deeper health tracking.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: A rendering of the Whoop 5.0/MG bands from its May launch in black and white color options.
media:content.media:text: A rendering of the Whoop 5.0/MG bands from its May launch in black and white color options.
media:content.media:title: A rendering of the Whoop 5.0/MG bands from its May launch in black and white color options.

item.title: Samsung's biggest One UI update yet is finally rolling out in the U.S.
item.description: The new One UI 8.5 update brings several Galaxy S26 features to the Galaxy S25 series.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Notification summary and prioritize notification feature on Galaxy S26 Ultra

item.title: This breakout Pixel display feature is delivering comfort in a way I had never realized
item.description: Google introduced a new Comfort Filters option with the latest Pixel update, and its muted colors will make a world of difference for your eyes.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Comfort View and Comfort Filters on the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:text: Comfort View and Comfort Filters on the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:title: Comfort View and Comfort Filters on the Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: The Tom's Guide Savings Squad is packed with experts, opening my eyes to big deals I've never seen
item.description: Tom's Guide just launched a Savings Squad to save me—and you—the most money we can in these tumultuous times.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Tom's Guide announces its Savings Squad, a place where consumers are connected with experts to find the best deals on the products they want.
media:content.media:text: Tom's Guide announces its Savings Squad, a place where consumers are connected with experts to find the best deals on the products they want.
media:content.media:title: Tom's Guide announces its Savings Squad, a place where consumers are connected with experts to find the best deals on the products they want.

item.title: The new Fitbit Air offers an intriguing alternative to the Pixel Watch, but is Google's Whoop competitor compelling enough for you?
item.description: The $99 Fitbit Air sounds like a compelling alternative to other smartwatches, but would you ditch your smartwatch or other wearable for Google's latest?
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.
media:content.media:text: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.

item.title: New Fitbit Air details how it compares to Whoop — and how it actually works
item.description: We now have more details about Fitbit Air's gesture control design and compact size.

item.title: Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 vs. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra: Two ultra phones for two different types of people
item.description: The Motorola Razr Ultra 2026 vs. Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra are two phones with very different designs, but both offer premium AI experiences.
item.author: christinep2424@gmail.com (Christine Persaud)
item.dc:creator: Christine Persaud

item.title: Beats headphones and earbuds surprisingly support these Android-exclusive features
item.description: Google ecosystem features like Fast Pair, Find My Device, and Audio Switching are surprisingly available on Beats gear — here's how to use them.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The transparent red Beats Solo buds on a ledge.

media:content.media:title: The transparent red Beats Solo buds on a ledge.

item.title: Does the Motorola Razr Fold support a stylus pen?
item.description: The Motorola Razr Fold is the company's first book-style foldable phone, and it works with both finger and stylus input with a specific advanced pen.

item.dc:creator: Christine Persaud

item.title: These are the 5 features that make the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 worth it
item.description: I love the basic Galaxy Watch 8, and these five fitness and health features make the Wear OS smartwatch worth using.

item.title: This buried Samsung feature helps keep my Galaxy S26 running like new
item.description: Device Care is a built-in feature available on the Galaxy S26 series and other Samsung phones. It comes with features such as Auto Restart that can keep your device running smoothly.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

item.title: New Verizon deal is waiving activation fees on ALL phones for a limited time — here's what you need to know
item.description: Nobody likes activation fees, but Verizon is tackling the issue by waiving all fees for a limited time when you buy a new device from its online store.

item.title: A buggy Fitbit update is blinding sensors on the Pixel Watch 3 and 4
item.description: Google’s latest Fitbit update is breaking SpO2 and skin temperature tracking on Pixel Watches, leaving users frustrated.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Ready for a change? Switch from AT&T or Verizon and T-Mobile will give you up to $800 to pay off your phone
item.description: If you're in the market for a new wireless plan, ditch Verizon or AT&T and T-Mobile will give you up to 800 bucks to pay off your existing smartphone.

item.title: The 'fantastic' Garmin Fenix 8 just scored a rare discount at Amazon — but is the premium fitness watch still worth it?

item.title: Viture already has the best smart glasses ecosystem, and these two new products somehow make it even better
item.description: I've loved Viture's extended smart glasses ecosystem for years, and now things just got even better with a pair of new releases.

item.title: I finally figured out why no one can hear me in multiplayer Quest games
